records.question: Which episodes from season 9 or later of Law and Order have the title Bait, are exactly episode 3, have a number in the series of at least 184, and received at most 159 votes?

records.question: Which episodes from the series Law and Order have associated keywords, awards, credits, and votes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE episode.series = 'Law and Order'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.episode_id
FROM Episode AS T1
INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2
  ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id
INNER JOIN Award AS T3
  ON T1.episode_id = T3.episode_id
INNER JOIN Credit AS T4
  ON T1.episode_id = T4.episode_id
INNER JOIN Vote AS T5
  ON T1.episode_id = T5.episode_id
WHERE
  T1.series = 'Law and Order'

records.question: Which episodes from Law and Order, titled DWB and rated 7.9, are in season 9 or later and have uncredited cast members?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
WHERE episode.series = 'Law and Order' AND episode.rating = 7.9 AND episode.title = 'DWB' AND credit.credited = 'false' AND episode.season >= 9
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.episode_id
FROM Episode AS T1
INNER JOIN Credit AS T2
  ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id
WHERE
  T1.series = 'Law and Order' AND T1.title = 'DWB' AND T1.rating = 7.9 AND T1.season >= 9 AND T2.credited = 'No'
